Looking for a game that soothes the soul but keeps your brain spinning? Welcome to Meowdoku — a pure logic puzzle game that flawlessly blends the rigorous reasoning of Sudoku with the thrilling deduction of Minesweeper.
Here, you have only one mission: find the perfect "exclusive territory" for every aloof little cat!
💡 Simple Rules, Deep Strategy
The concept is elegant and intuitive, yet anything but simple:
• Exclusive Territory: The board is divided into colored sections. You must place exactly one cat in each section.
• The Aloof Rule: Cats need absolute personal space! They absolutely cannot share the same row, column, or touch each other—not even diagonally.
• Risk & Reward: Double-tap a tile to place a cat. You only have 3 chances to make a mistake (hearts). Guess right, and you're rewarded with pure puzzle-solving satisfaction; guess wrong, and you lose a heart. Guessing won't save you; every single move must be carefully calculated!
✨ Key Features
🐾 Pure & Immersive Experience
- Non-Intrusive Ads: Zero interruptions to your gameplay, letting you fully enjoy a completely focused, Zen-like flow state.
- Play Offline Anytime: No internet required. Perfectly fills up the puzzle-shaped hole in your daily commute, time spent waiting in line, or your morning coffee break.
📅 Daily Brain Teasers
- Wake up your mind with brand-new "Daily Puzzles" every single day.
- Push your limits and see if you can break your fastest completion times on the global leaderboards.
❤️ Why Meowdoku Will Stay on Your Phone
Meowdoku won't hijack your attention with tedious social mechanics or endless daily grinds—it earns your love through pure gameplay quality. With its minimalist aesthetic and satisfying tactile feedback, it takes just seconds to learn. Yet, long after you put your phone down, its elegant logic loop will keep lingering in your mind.
Ready for a brain-teasing puzzle adventure filled with adorable felines?
Download Meowdoku now, put your logic to the test, and become the ultimate feline puzzle master!

Welcome to Amaze GO! A clean arrows puzzle game built to calm a busy mind. Every arrow points the way — what you need to do is to choose the right order. The design cuts visual noise, reduces chaos, and helps you organize thoughts as you play. Pick up an arrow. Find its lane. Repeat until the grid is yours. Enjoy the quiet flow offline anywhere and anytime. 

What makes Amaze GO! great
1. Streamlined arrows puzzle that declutters the screen and the mind
2. Works offline with a clean interface that keeps attention on the board
3. Calm play loop for smart brains: think clearly, move each arrow with strategy
4. Smooth tap controls, clear path feedback, and satisfying release moments like ASMR

How to Play
- Find an arrow with a free path to the edge
- Tap to slide that arrow off the grid and open a lane for the next move
- Plan the order to secure a safe route and a clean board
- Long-Press to use Guidance to highlight directions when your path is unclear
- A wrong tap costs a heart for the level
- Clear the board to finish the level and aim for a perfect run
- Hints help focus when the grid feels tight

Why love this arrow puzzle
· Simple rules, profound strategy, and a meditative arrows puzzle
· Short breaks ease stress and sharpen focus
· The last arrow leaves the board with a satisfying mental reset
· Cognitive workout for sequencing and brain teasers
· Quiet visuals, plus a satisfying whoosh as each arrow flies off the grid — feedback that soothes instead of nags

Made for the in-between moments
- The ten minutes before a meeting starts 
- The metro ride too short for a podcast 
- The flight where your signal drops
- The wind-down after a noisy workday 

Amaze GO! - Puzzle Games is a quiet arrows puzzle made for sharp minds and calm moments. Learn fast, then master timing and order. Send every arrow off the board, untangle the grid, and feel disorder turn into clarity. Amaze GO! is the arrows puzzle you reach for when the rest of the day was too loud — one good move, then another, then a quiet board. Download now, plan smart paths, keep hearts safe, and enjoy pure focus anytime, anywhere!

Vita Mahjong is an Exclusive Puzzle Game of Tile Matching. We are thrilled to present the mahjong  game that combines innovation with classic gameplay. It offers large tiles and a user-friendly interface compatible with pads and phones. Our goal is to provide a relaxing yet mentally engaging gaming experience, particularly focused on older adults.

At Vita Studio, we have always been dedicated to crafting mobile games designed for seniors that bring back relaxation, fun, and joy. Our repertoire includes popular titles like Vita Color, Vita Jigsaw, Vita Word Search, Vita Block, Vita Sudoku, and more.

How to Play Vita Mahjong:
Playing free Vita Mahjong game is simple. Just aim to clear all the tiles on the board by matching tiles with identical images. Tap or slide two matching tiles, and they will vanish from the board. Your objective is to match tiles that are not concealed or blocked. Once all tiles are eliminated, it signifies successful completion of a majong game!

Exclusive Vita Mahjong  Game Features:
• Classic Mahjong : Staying true to the original gameplay, it presents traditional card tile sets and hundreds of boards.
• Special Innovations: Besides the classic, our game introduces special tiles that add a fresh twist to the classic mahjong.
• Large-Scale Design: Our mahjong games feature large, easily readable text sizes to alleviate the strain caused by small fonts.
• Active Mind Levels: A special mode designed to sharpen your mind and improve memory abilities in the mahjong games. 
• Customizable Scoring:  You can enjoy free classic mahjong games without a timer and any score pressure.
• Super Combo: When you consecutively match mahjong tiles during the game, you will unlock special experiences.
• Helpful Hints: Our game provides free useful props, such as hints, undo, and shuffle, to help players overcome challenging puzzles.
• Daily Challenge: Take on daily practice to collect trophies and improve your classic mahjong solitaire game skills.
• Offline Mode: Full offline support lets you enjoy Vita Mahjong anytime, anywhere, without needing internet.
• Multi-device: Optimized for pad and phone, ensuring everyone can enjoy the classic mahjong game.

Vita Mahjong is a versatile game made for those who love tile matching games. Download Vita Mahjong and start your mahjong dynasty now!

Note: This is a puzzle game in the style of Mahjong Solitaire. It does not contain the rules of traditional Mahjong or other types of solitaire or card games. The term “Mahjong” here refers solely to the visual style of the tiles.

Contact us : support@vitastudio.ai
For more information, you can:
Join our Facebook group: https://www.facebook.com/groups/vitastudio
Visit our official website: www.vitamahjong.com

Arrow Puzzle is a relaxing logic game that turns simple taps into a rewarding challenge. Your goal is straightforward: find a free path, tap arrows in the right order, and enjoy as the maze slowly turns into a clear, empty board. Follow the arrows to escape the puzzle and find a soothing flow that keeps your mind engaged and relaxed.

Looking for a gentle workout for your brain without any pressure attached? This comforting arrow game lets you tap away the stress, gives you a focused break from the noise, and helps you train your logic and spatial thinking as you build a calming daily ritual. Each cleared board in the arrow game is a small mental reset—a satisfying win for your mind.

How to Play Arrow Puzzle:

• In this tap away puzzle game, your goal is to clear the grid—a maze of arrows all pointing in different directions.
• Escape the arrow puzzle grid by finding a free path. An arrow moves only when its way ahead is clear and no other arrows are blocking its path. Take a moment to think first.
• Tap arrows away one by one to help them leave the grid and open up more space for the others.
• Avoid blocked arrows. If you tap an arrow whose path is blocked, you lose a life. Lives are limited on each level, but you can always rethink your plan and try again at your own pace.
• If you get stuck, use helpful hints to highlight an arrow that can safely escape the maze.
• Plan the order of your taps, help every arrow escape, and enjoy the moment when the last arrow leaves and everything falls into place.

Why You'll Love Arrow Puzzle:

✔ A minimalist arrow game with simple rules and deep strategy—easy to start, satisfying to master.
✔ Hundreds of handcrafted tap away style puzzles that grow in challenge as you play.
✔ Daily Challenges—play every day, complete monthly challenges, and collect unique trophies.
✔ Helpful hints when you need a small nudge to release an arrow and keep the flow going.
✔ No timer, no pressure—a relaxing escape and a true delight for your mind.
✔ Clean, calming visuals and smooth animations that keep the focus on puzzle-solving in this tap game.

Play Arrow Puzzle, clear the grid of arrows, and enjoy a rare balance of sharp focus and deep relaxation.

data.app_name: Level Devil - NOT A Troll Game
data.app_description:
A nice, peaceful platformer

Run, jump, reach the door, and enjoy a calm little adventure full of fair levels, friendly spikes, trustworthy platforms, and perfectly normal surprises. You will definitely not rage. You will definitely not die again and again. And every trap is probably just your imagination.

Level Devil is a relaxing skill game for players who love hard platformers, impossible jumps, funny fails, and totally safe little challenges. Test your timing, trust the floor, avoid the spikes, ignore the traps, and prove that you are invincible. Or don’t. That’s fine too.

Features:

- 240+ happy little levels
- Simple controls for very skilled people
- Spikes, traps, and other friendly decorations
- Funny fails you will want to pretend never happened
- Local 2-player mode to share the suffering
- Secrets, surprises, and completely fair level design
- A peaceful experience for fans of rage games, hard platformers, memes, and dying again

This is not a troll game.
This is not impossible.
This is not trying to trick you.

Please download Level Devil and have a wonderful, relaxing time. You deserve it.

Conveyor’s ready, pigs are on standby. Tap to send a pig onto the conveyor so it rains balls onto pixel cubes of its own color. The number above its head is its ammo: that’s how many hits it makes. Run out and it leaves the stage; if not, it slips into one of the 5 waiting slots and, when you tap again, it jumps back on the conveyor to fire another round.
The conveyor has a capacity—push past the limit and you’ll need to wait. Send them in the right order, manage the flow, and hit the cubes to clear the board piece by piece. Simple mechanic, sticky loop: tap → flow → repeat.
Highlights
One-tap control: Quick sessions, easy one-handed play.
Color matching: Pigs only hit their own color—no target-picking hassle.
Conveyor capacity: Timing and queue management add a bite-size strategy layer.
5 waiting slots: Stack, sort, and launch at the perfect moment.
Short but “one more round” feel: Perfect for micro-breaks.
Satisfying pixel cleanup: Every hit leaves the board feeling crisp.
For anyone who loves fast action-puzzles, timing, and flow management. The pigs are ready. The cubes… not so much.

Yarn Loop is a relaxing and satisfying puzzle game featuring colorful yarn bobbins and knitted patterns.

Bobbins move onto the conveyor and collect stitches of their own color. Each bobbin has a capacity value that decreases as stitches are picked up. When its capacity reaches zero, the bobbin disappears. If capacity remains, the bobbin is transferred to the rack and can be used again later.
 
Complete each knitted pattern by using the right bobbins in the right order.

Game Features
► Simple One-Tap Gameplay: Bobbins move smoothly through the conveyor system and collect matching stitches with ease.
► Color-Based Collection Mechanic: Each bobbin clears only the stitches of its own color.
► Capacity Management System: Every bobbin has a limited pickup value, creating thoughtful and satisfying puzzle decisions.
► Rack Reuse Function: Bobbins that still have capacity return to the rack and remain available for later use.
► Hundreds of Engaging Levels: New knitted layouts, color combinations, and puzzle arrangements appear throughout progression.
► Cozy Yarn Aesthetic: Soft textures, warm colors, and pleasant animations create a calm and enjoyable experience.

Yarn Loop offers a smooth, calm, and visually charming journey through handcrafted yarn puzzles.

How to play this free original solitaire card games
To solve this FREE Solitaire card puzzle, you should move all solitaire cards of 4 suits - hearts, diamonds, spades and crosses to the Solitaire Foundations. There is one deck - 52 solitaire cards in the classic Solitaire game.

Your castle isn't just your base, it's your weapon. Every wall you destroy opens a new angle. Every floor you collapse exposes an enemy. In Castle Busters, the battlefield falls apart in real time, and the player who reads it best wins.

WHY PLAYERS LOVE CASTLE BUSTERS

🏰 Fully destructible castles. Blast holes through walls to create firing lines and collapse floors to drop enemy units. No two PvP matches ever play out the same way.
⚡ Real-time 1v1 PvP. Fast online multiplayer matches packed with tactical decisions where every shot counts and every second of hesitation hands your rival a new opening.
🛡️ Build your loadout. Draft up to 8 unique units: knights, archers, bombers and siege engines. Each one changes how you attack, the angles you threaten, and how you defend your keep.
📈 Deep upgrades. Level up units, unlock new perks, and reinforce the parts of your castle that matter most. The longer you play, the sharper your arsenal gets.
🏆 Ranked arenas. Climb from Bronze to Legend and battle real players on seasonal leaderboards.
🔥 The Forge. Earn epic rewards by upgrading your squad and stronghold. The deeper you go, the meaner the meta gets.
🎯 Play your way. Precision snipes, brute-force sieges, decoy walls or collapse traps. Every strategy can win if you execute it right.

CORE GAMEPLAY
Aim and fire from inside your castle using your drafted units. The walls between you and your enemy aren't obstacles, they're opportunities. Destroy supports to collapse towers onto enemy positions. Carve a sightline through three floors to land a shot no one saw coming. Bait your opponent into breaking through where they shouldn't. In Castle Busters, defense is never passive. It's a trap.

Win by wiping out all enemy units, or by turning their castle into rubble. Arena hazards shift your angles and destructible terrain means every PvP battle is a puzzle that builds itself in real time.

DRAFT YOUR ARMY
Knights to break the front line. Archers to punish exposed units. Bombers to crack open walls and towers. Siege engines to flatten whole sections of an enemy castle. Mix and match up to 8 units into a loadout that fits your playstyle: patient and surgical, or fast and chaotic. Then upgrade each unit to unlock power spikes that open entirely new ways to play and clash.

META AND PROGRESSION
Your units grow with you. Level them up to unlock new perks, power spikes and fresh tactical options. Your castle evolves too. Reinforce the walls and towers that matter most, then test your build in multiplayer PvP. Ranked ladders and arenas introduce new obstacles, tighter matchups and fresh unit unlocks the deeper you climb. At the top of every leaderboard are players who have spent hundreds of hours perfecting their builds. You'll need to outthink them, not just outshoot them.

WHO IT'S FOR
If you love real-time strategy games, 1v1 PvP duels, tower-and-castle warfare, or fast online multiplayer battles you can finish in a few minutes, Castle Busters is built for you. Easy to pick up, hard to master, and impossible to play the same way twice.

BUILD. BREAK. REPEAT.
Some builds are patient. Some are pure chaos. None of them are wrong if they win the battle. Draft your squad, fortify your keep, sharpen your aim. The arena is open. Go break something.

FREE TO PLAY
Castle Busters is free to download and play. Some in-game items are available for purchase. A network connection is required. Suitable for players 13+.

Meccha Chameleon is a funny, creative, and colorful camouflage game where painting is the secret to hiding.
In Meccha Chameleon, you begin as a plain white character, almost like an empty canvas. Your mission in Meccha Chameleon is simple but very fun: look around the stage, choose the best hiding spot, paint your body to match the background, and pose perfectly so nobody can find you.
Meccha Chameleon is not just a normal coloring game. In Meccha Chameleon, every level becomes a creative hide-and-seek puzzle. You must observe the environment carefully and decide where your character can disappear best. Maybe you hide next to a wall, a poster, a floor, a piece of furniture, a colorful object, a shadow, a corner, or a decoration.
Once you choose your hiding place in Meccha Chameleon, it is time to paint. Your character starts white, and you must cover the body with the right colors, shapes, and patterns. In Meccha Chameleon, the goal is not only to make beautiful art. The real goal is to blend into the scene and become almost invisible.
A simple color may not be enough in Meccha Chameleon. If the background has stripes, dots, shadows, textures, drawings, or small details, you need to copy them carefully. The better your painting, the stronger your camouflage becomes. That is what makes Meccha Chameleon so fun, funny, and satisfying.
But painting is only half of the challenge. In Meccha Chameleon, your pose matters too. After coloring your character, you must choose a pose that helps your painted body line up with the background. A smart pose can complete the illusion, while a bad pose can reveal you immediately.
Meccha Chameleon mixes coloring, puzzle thinking, creativity, and hide-and-seek gameplay into one simple casual game. Every stage in Meccha Chameleon gives you a new chance to test your eyes, your imagination, and your ability to blend in like a real chameleon.
If you enjoy coloring games, casual games, puzzle games, funny character games, camouflage games, or creative hide-and-seek games, Meccha Chameleon is made for you.
Features
Paint a plain white character in Meccha Chameleon.
Find the best hiding spot in every Meccha Chameleon level.
Copy colors, patterns, textures, shadows, and background details.
Use your creativity to blend into walls, floors, objects, and decorations.
Choose the right pose to complete the camouflage illusion.
Enjoy funny and creative gameplay in Meccha Chameleon.
Play relaxing stages with clever visual challenges.
In Meccha Chameleon, your art becomes your hiding power. Paint smart, pose well, and hide perfectly.

SORT YOUR WAY TO HAPPINESS 😃

Master mergers, ready those fingers and get to matching in 3…2…1! This fun sorting puzzle features colorful coins that need to be matched up in their slots and then merged together to clear the playing field, making way for more. Bright colors, simple graphics, and lots of boosters ensure that your brain can focus on what it does best: noticing patterns and finding unique ways to shuffle everything around in order to win.

MASTER THE MATCH 🧩

Simple in theory yet difficult in practice, players young and old will enjoy racking their brains for the best possible way to merge the different color coins and keep progressing. With no timer or pressure to trip you up, you’ll be able to sort, match, and merge the coins while also relaxing.

Fun features:

🤑 Tons of coin types – In addition to your standard rainbow of coins to match, as you progress there will be all manner or fun new coins to keep things fresh. Hidden coins, linked coins, ice coins, and more await, so keep your eyes peeled!

🤔 Easy on the eye – As colorful as this sorting puzzle is, the whole point is to help you chill so we’ve done away with any crazy graphics or flashing lights. This also means the game is great to play wherever you find yourself, solo or perhaps with a little helper.

💆‍♂️ Relaxing to play – No countdown clock here! Take as much time on each puzzle as you need, and move the coins around as much as you want without being penalized. We believe in having fun, not getting stressed.

🧠 Train your brain – Sorting and matching puzzles are a great way to train your brain to recognize patterns and colors, and to work on your logic and thinking skills as you test out different ways to group coins. And it doesn’t stop there, the skills you hone in the game can be applied to other stuff in real life.

📈 Keep growing – As you progress through the puzzle levels, more colors and coin types will be added, and things will get steadily more difficult. But no fear, even as you’re pushed to get better we’ve added plenty of fun boosters to keep it chill.

GO ON A COLORFUL ADVENTURE ⛰️

Ready to start your merge adventure? This relaxing game keeps your mind sharp while also providing a fun escape as you enjoy sorting and matching, so hop on in to become the master sorter and put all this stuff where it needs to be!

Download Pocket Sort: Coin Puzzle today to see how good you are at locating different colored coins and slotting them in together.

Sword x Staff is a one-of-a-kind RPG — a “Third Way RPG.”
Strategy, massive world exploration, idle—why pick one when you can have it all?
Go hardcore, or just vibe—either way, you’ll find your own kind of fun here. The kind that actually feels different.
No pressure, no one way to play—just jump in, explore, and let the adventure click your way.
Curious what the gameplay is really like?
So, welcome to the unique world of Kanstein, and experience the one-of-a-kind Third Way adventure. Here, you are the Chosen Adventurer transported to this isekai! Team up with the Staff and Sword Twins and dive into a quest to save the world. Pierce through thick fog, dig up forgotten treasures, and explore a huge interactive world at your own pace. Mix and match over 200 skills to create a fighting style that’s uniquely yours. Best of all, you’ll meet amazing allies to fight by your side against legendary Hieromons! Of course—Remember, all of this can be enjoyed completely pressure-free, since the idle gameplay making resource gathering a breeze！ 
[Idle Game, but with a massive interactive world] 
Most idle games have you waiting. Sword x Staff lets you actually go somewhere.
Step into a huge world map where every region has its own vibe and secrets to uncover. Roam the lush wilds of Verdantglade, face the clash of steel and instinct in Cinder Ridge, drift through the mist-shrouded waters of Aqualis, and uncover the ancient bronze ruins hidden within Loong Haven.
Every region brings new sights, companions, treasures, and those "just one more look" moments. And even when you're offline, your adventure doesn't stop. Resources keep piling up while you rest, and the Traveling Merchant shows up with rare goods while you're away. Log back in, cash out, and keep going. 
[Deep strategy, but easy to jump in] 
Strategy is fun because of freedom, not because it needs a spreadsheet.
Everything starts with the classic Warrior & Mage dual-class system, branching into 200+ skill combinations and playstyles. Mix skills, change cast order, swap elemental builds, and fine-tune your setup however you like.
No fixed meta. No single "right" answer. Just true variety and real flexibility, and plenty of room to experiment.
Keep it casual, or go full theorycraft mode. How deep you go is completely up to you.
[Progress Without the Grind] 
Power up without the endless farming. Even while you're offline, resources stack up, characters grow stronger, and progression keeps moving.
Lie back, rest up, and wake up stronger! Watch clouds drift across the Floating Islands, stargaze from your cozy cabin, hunt for hidden treasure, or level up while doing absolutely nothing heroic for a minute.
Easy progress, low stress, steady rewards—that's what we call relaxed, efficient progression
[Auto-Battles Are Easy, But Never Boring] 
Tired of idle games where heroes just stand still? Here, AI-driven characters adapt to the battlefield—repositioning, predicting enemies, chasing targets, and unleashing ultimate skills. Auto-battles aren’t boring—they’re tactical, flashy, and full of epic combos.
[Unique avatars, without looking the same] 
Your avatar is yours, full stop. Go bold with wild hairstyles, unusual features, standout looks, or choices that are a little chaotic in the best way. Make something cool, weird, stylish, hilarious—or all four at once! No "same face, different outfit." Make it 100% original. Walk into town and stand out. In Kanstein, being unforgettable is part of the fun.

This feature makes for some truly thrilling moments, as you can use it to avoid the nextbots and other enemies that are trying to hunt you down. Additionally, there are many abilities such as running through walls and acceleration that make the gameplay even more exciting.

Another great feature of Hide in the Backrooms is its vast array of locations. You'll need to navigate through different back rooms, each with its own unique challenges and dangers. The game is designed to be challenging and intense, with plenty of jump scares, tense moments and the back rooms that will keep you on your toes.

The goal of the game is to escape the back room, and to do so, you'll need to stay one step ahead of terrifying nextbots known as Bacteria, Siren Head, Obunga, Game Master and others. These scary creatures are sure to give you nightmares and will stop at nothing to catch you.

In conclusion, if you're looking for a creepy and intense horror game that will keep you on the edge of your seat, then Hide in the Backrooms is definitely worth checking out. With its creepy setting and back rooms, challenging gameplay, and terrifying nextbots, it's sure to provide plenty of thrills and scares. So why not give it a try and see if you have what it takes to escape the backrooms?

Number Match is a logic puzzle game with simple rules: match pairs of numbers and clear the board to succeed. Playing Number Match is a useful pastime for your brain. Train your logic and concentration skills, and try to beat your high score in the numbers game!

Try a mobile version of the pen and paper game from your childhood, known as Take Ten, Numberama or 10 Seeds. Now you can take your logic number game with you wherever you go. Solving free Number Match puzzles on mobile is much easier than using a pencil and paper.

Immerse yourself in the world of math number games! Take a break and play Number Match puzzles whenever you feel tired or bored. Refresh yourself by solving addictive logic and math puzzles and matching numbers! If you like classic board games, try Number Match. Enjoy the magic of digits and give your brain a great time. Become a match number master!

Number Match is an easy to learn math game that puts your gray matter to work! Merge numbers to clear the board. Coordinate your eyes, hands and mind. Enjoy hours of fun with this free number game. Time flies when you're having fun with this number drop game! Install the number game now to try it and you won't be able to stop!

How to play this logic puzzle:

• The goal is to clear all the numbers from the board.
• Find pairs of equal numbers (1 and 1, 7 and 7) or pairs that add up to 10 (6 and 4, 8 and 2) on the number grid.
• Tap on the numbers one by one to cross out them and get points.
• You can connect pairs in adjacent horizontal, vertical and diagonal cells, as well as at the end of one line and the beginning of the next.
• If you run out of moves, you can add the remaining numbers to extra lines at the bottom.
• Speed up your progress with Hints if you are stuck in this math game.
• You win once all the numbers are removed from the number puzzle grid.

Beat Your Score

The emptier the board is, the better your score! Score the most points by crossing out all the numbers on the field (+150 points), and removing rows (+10 points). Score +4 points by connecting numbers that are far apart. Merge numbers and enjoy these math puzzles!

There are a lot of ways to solve the logic number puzzle. But it’s not as easy as it seems. Tease your brain and enjoy an engaging number games experience! If you like merging numbers mechanics, you will definitely enjoy this logic game!

What you get:

• Easy to learn logic puzzle
• Hours of gameplay in this number merge games
• Daily Challenges. Play every day, complete daily challenges for a given month, and win unique trophies
• Seasonal Events. Take part in game events and open exclusive postcards
• No time limit, so no rush, just relax playing math number games
• Hints to help you reach the goal faster
• New math game with numbers from a top developer!

Challenge your brain and logic with Number Match puzzle and become a master! Play this number game anywhere, anytime!

Vita Mahjong Wood is an exclusive classic wooden tile matching puzzle game. We are thrilled to present this mahjong game that combines innovation with classic gameplay. How to Play Vita Mahjong Wood:
Playing the free Vita Mahjong Wood game is simple. Just aim to clear all the tiles on the board by matching tiles with identical images. Tap or slide two matching wooden tiles, and they will vanish from the board. Your objective is to match tiles that are not concealed or blocked. Once all tiles are eliminated, it signifies successful completion of a mahjong game!
Exclusive Vita Mahjong Wood Game Features:
- Classic Wooden Mahjong Experience: Staying true to the original gameplay, it presents traditional wood-grained tile sets and hundreds of boards, offering you the purest classic feel.

- Active Mind Levels: A special mode designed to sharpen your mind and improve memory abilities in the mahjong games.

Why Idle Dot Shooter is satisfying:
You're always one upgrade away from a new rhythm. Faster fire rate, bigger damage, denser spawns, stronger suction, higher value... then you watch the screen erupt into chaos as your earnings climb. That's the incremental idle loop every idle shooter fan craves.

Features:
🎯 Idle auto-shooting turret
Clean, minimalist visuals over true idle shooter gameplay. Tap in, upgrade, tap out, come back richer. Tower defense distilled to its purest form: one turret, infinite dots, endless upgrades.

🛡️ Defence upgrades
Push fire rate and damage to bullet hell levels. Watch your dot shooter scale from a popgun into a wall of auto-fire destruction. Real depth without the map clutter.

🤖 Drone upgrades
Boost speed, suction, agility, and size. Your drone vacuums up earnings while your turret shoots - the perfect idle shooter companion for hands-off incremental idle play.

💰 Economy upgrades
Stack capacity, value, spawn rate, and luck. Every upgrade multiplies into the next, fueling the incremental idle engine that makes Idle Dot Shooter so addictive. The loop every idle shooter fan comes back for.
💥 Bullet hell abilities
Frenzy, Dot Rain, and Black Hole. Trigger them to break the idle rhythm and unleash full idle bullet hell chaos. Pure bullet hell energy.

📊 Command Centre stats
Track dots destroyed, shots fired, crits, time active, damage distribution, and more. Optimise your build like a true dot shooter strategist. Every great run starts with reading the numbers.

🏆 Global leaderboard
Climb the ranks for most dots destroyed. Prove you're the best idle shooter player out there. Compete with bullet hell and tower defense fans worldwide.

🌌 Galaxy progression
Move beyond the void toward new destinations. Each galaxy brings new modifiers and new ways to scale your incremental idle empire. The further you push, the harder the screen gets.

🎁 Rewarded boosts
Optional rewarded ads for extra cash and ability charges. Your idle dot shooter run, your call. Pure incremental idle freedom.

What makes Idle Dot Shooter different:
Most idle shooter games drown you in menus. Most tower defense games chain you to a fixed map. Idle Dot Shooter borrows tower defense pacing without the lane-following clutter. It strips everything down: one screen, one turret, one beautiful idle bullet hell waiting to unfold. The incremental idle progression hits harder because nothing distracts from it. Every upgrade shows up immediately on screen - more bullets, more dots, more chaos, more cash.
It's the crossover the idle shooter genre has been missing - a true incremental idle game where your build is your tactic and your screen is your battlefield.

Idle shooter and idle dot shooter mechanics
Bullet hell action and arcade scaling

Incremental idle games with deep upgrade systems
Minimalist arcade games and auto-shooter loops

FOLLOW THAT ARROW ➡️

Get your mind and fingers set to untangle mazes of arrows in the fun take on a traditional maze escape game. Each level you’ll square off against an increasingly tangled knot of arrows, and you’ll need to put all of your logic skills to the test as you figure out which order to remove them, thus clearing the way for the rest. Fear not though, this puzzle is minimalistic and relaxing, not cluttered and stressful.

MASTER THE MAZE 🧩

Colorful arrows twist and turn around each other, and it’s up to you to figure out which way they’re headed and help them escape from the puzzle grid, making way for others to be moved as well. Levels start off with just a few arrows, and quickly work up to more and more, keeping things interesting. While the puzzle required you to use your logic skills and brain, it still manages to be relaxing and just the perfect level of challenging.

You’ll love:

🎴 The minimalistic design – Black background, colorful arrows, and no crazy animations or over-the-top graphics – focus on the puzzle without worrying about what might pop up next. The bright arrows stand out well from the background making it easier to see how the maze all fits together, and adding a touch of whimsy to the game. Easily toggle the music and haptic on or off depending on your mood, and don’t worry about tons of popups and events cluttering your game.

🌌 The relaxing gameplay – Each level is short and sweet, meaning you can easily squeeze one in whenever you need a distraction. Plus there’s no countdown clock to put pressure on you, so if you get stuck you can easily step away and come back to finish later when you’ve got the time and energy. Last but not least boosters are available in case you can’t quite get past a tricky level.

✨ The mental stimulation – While the puzzles might seem simple at first, you’ll find that they start getting challenging fast! More arrows, more twists, and more fun await as you graduate from levels with just a handful of arrows to those with dozens. All those extra colors and crazy shapes and patterns will really stimulate your brain to start looking for patterns, which can be super helpful in real life.

A CHALLENGING ESCAPE 🧠

Ready to take on an a-maze-ing arrow puzzle that will both relax and challenge your brain? With its simple design and fun graphics you won’t feel a lick of stress as you take on this logic puzzle and help the arrows escape.

Download Arrows Escape today and see how many levels of twisty, knotted up arrows you can detangle before getting stuck.
